messages.subject: [R-jobs] [JOB] Research Software Engineer University of Sheffield
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] [JOB] Research Software Engineer University of Sheffield
messages.body_plain:
Hi,

An opening is available to join the growing Research Software Engineering
(RSE) group (https://rse.shef.ac.uk) on an open ended contract. The role is
ideal for someone with a passion for research software looking to use their
skills in R programming for collaborative software development and
reproducible research to make an impact on research projects across the
whole of the University of Sheffield.

Six reasons to apply https://rse.shef.ac.uk/blog/2022-05-12-rrse/

Further information and details of how to apply
https://www.jobs.ac.uk/job/CPR556/research-software-engineer

Regards,

Neil
--

Neil Shephard
Research Software Engineer, University of Sheffield

Training : https://rse.shef.ac.uk/training/
Events : https://rse.shef.ac.uk/events/
Blog : https://rse.shef.ac.uk/blog/
Newsletters : https://rse.shef.ac.uk/newsletters/
Lunch Bytes : https://rse.shef.ac.uk/community/lunch-bytes/

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
